question_text: Which of the following best describes gravitational force?

options.label: A
options.text: A contact force between two rough surfaces

options.label: B
options.text: A non-contact force that pulls objects toward the Earth

options.label: C
options.text: A force that only acts on heavy objects

options.label: D
options.text: A force created by friction between objects

explanation: Gravitational force is a non-contact force that pulls all objects toward the Earth, regardless of their mass. It acts over a distance and is responsible for what we call weight.
